title: Prepare Docker Compose deployment
goal: Run the full stack locally and on a small VM using Docker Compose.
scope: Add compose file with Caddy, web, api, mcp, postgres.
Add backup script for PostgreSQL dumps.
verification: docker compose up starts all services.
Caddy routes web, api, and mcp correctly.
notes: Added a local development PostgreSQL compose file bound to 127.0.0.1 only.
Added npm and Makefile commands for starting, stopping, logging, opening psql, and resetting the development database.
Full production compose stack with Caddy, web, api, mcp, and backups remains in scope for the deployment task.
